h2.span: Overall issues and pull requests status

section.div: A lightweight hybrid Laravel + Vue 3 project with Tailwind CSS, powered by Vite. Perfect for small inventory management or as a boilerplate for Laravel + Vue hybrid apps.

Doctor Appointment system built with React.js (frontend) and Laravel (backend). Users can register, view doctors, and book appointments. Doctors can manage appointments, view patients, and confirm/cancel bookings. Admin can oversee users, doctors, and appointments.

This repository contains a basic MVC CRUD application written in Core PHP. It is designed for developers who are learning Laravel and want to understand MVC, routing, controllers, and database interactions from the ground up.
This repo contains the information about how to install Laravel Reverb in the existing project of Laravel and how to connect with React JS.
This repo contains the information about how to install Laravel Reverb in the existing project of Laravel and how to connect with React JS.

A powerful user management system designed for seamless team and visibility group management, similar to Pipedrive. This project enables efficient user organization, role-based access control, and advanced team collaboration features.
My first React Native App as i am leaning React Native and try to build a mobile app to polish my skills and understanding the React Native Structure and basic fundamentals
This repository is designed for beginners to learn how to test function outputs and HTTP responses in Laravel using PHPUnit within a testing environment.
